title: Ethnic group differences in rates of SARS-CoV-2 testing, PCR-confirmed infections and COVID-19 related hospital admissions in young children by SARS-CoV-2- variant: national birth cohort study
author: Fariyo Abdullahi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The objective is to describe the rates of SARS-CoV-2 testing, PCR confirmed infections and COVID-19 related hospital admissions in children under 5 by ethnic group during the wild-type, alpha, delta and omicron variant waves.
steps_raw: The objective is to describe the rates of SARS-CoV-2 testing, PCR confirmed infections and COVID-19 related hospital admissions in children under 5 by ethnic group during the wild-type, alpha, delta and omicron variant waves.
